/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -pie --coverage -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/euxis-cli.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/euxis-cli.dir/src/main.cpp.o" -o euxis-cli  libeuxis-cli-lib.a ../euxis-runtime-cpp/libeuxis-runtime-cpp.a ../euxis-gateway-cpp/libeuxis-gateway-cpp.a ../euxis-core-cpp/libeuxis-core-cpp.a ../euxis-crypto-cpp/libeuxis-crypto-cpp.a ../_deps/ixwebsocket-build/libixwebsocket.a /usr/lib/libz.so ../euxis-adapters-cpp/libeuxis-adapters-cpp.a /usr/lib/libbrotlicommon.so /usr/lib/libbrotlienc.so /usr/lib/libbrotlidec.so /usr/lib/libz.so /usr/lib/libssl.so /usr/lib/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/libsodium.so ../euxis-metrics-cpp/libeuxis-metrics-cpp.a ../euxis-security-cpp/libeuxis-security-cpp.a /usr/lib/libspdlog.so.1.17.0 /usr/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/libsqlite3.so
